texto: I tend to be a person who starts with the presumption that I should trust you until you abuse the privilege, and then our relationship is forever changed. That's a very big line, and chances are it's not going to work if it's crossed. I warn people that this is how I'm going to deal with it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Penny Pritzker sobre temas ligados a trabalho. A afirmação “I tend to be a person who starts with the presumption that I should trust you until you abuse the…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, work, relationship, útil em momentos de mudanca e termino.

frase_original: I tend to be a person who starts with the presumption that I should trust you until you abuse the privilege, and then our relationship is forever changed. That's a very big line, and chances are it's not going to work if it's crossed. I warn people that this is how I'm going to deal with it.
